meta.title: Safety Pharmacology Training Dataset — Final Scorecard (Post FIX-001 + FIX-002)
passes_completed: Pass 1: Initial verification (S7A, S7B, E14/S7B Q&As, E14, S6(R1), S10, M3(R2) pp.1-20)
Pass 2: Gap-closure (M3(R2) pp.21-31, E11(R1) Addendum, IWG 2024 Concept Paper)
Pass 3: Final-4 verification (FDA CGT guidance, WHO vaccines Annex 1, M4S(R2), ICH S9)
Pass 4: FIX-003 — M3(R2) doc pages 17-20 direct verbatim re-read; 3 PARTIALLY_VERIFIED rules upgraded to VERIFIED
Pass 5: FIX-001 + FIX-002 — FDA/EMA E14/S7B Q&As and FDA S7A read in full; ADC/oligo/peptide and regional differences rules VERIFIED

Pass 6: QAS-QUOTES — E14/S7B Q&As pages 19-26 verbatim extraction; combination_drugs (Q&A 6.2), heart_rate_confounding (Q&A 6.1), clinical_implications (Q&A 7.1) upgraded. Key findings: J-Tpeakc confirmed absent from ICH Q&As; 20 bpm HR threshold confirmed absent from ICH Q&As.

Pass 7: S7A-PASS — S7A pages 1, 5-9 read in full. Verbatim quotes extracted for: well_characterized_pk_pd_exception (Section 2.9 VERIFIED), cns_follow_up/abuse_liability (Section 2.8.2.4 VERIFIED, source corrected from 2.8.1.1). Heart rate variability and pooling omissions corrected. out_of_scope items confirmed NOT in S7A verbatim — reclassified INFERRED.

Pass 7b: D1-CLOSE — d1-close-quotes.json — PV-01 through PV-07 (GLP/toxicology, pilot studies, reporting requirements, hERG vehicle controls, concentration verification, recording quality, S6(R1) incorporation context). D1: 84.8→90.2.

Pass 8: E14/S7B Q&As pp.27-46 + S7B §§3.1.1-3.1.3 full read — PV-08 through PV-17 closed (IKs currents, hERG safety margin formula, protein binding 1% floor, temperature, stimulation frequency, hiPSC-CM markers, S7B §3.1.1 positive controls, species list, species justification, PK in same animals, individual QT correction, sensitivity ~10 ms, proarrhythmia 6 criteria). D1: 90.2→97.7.

Pass 9: PV-08-to-PV-19-QUOTES — pv08-to-pv19-quotes.json — final recording-gap closure (PV-18: S7B §3.1.3 dose-design; PV-19: S7B §3.1.1 positive control sub-item). D1: 97.7→99.2. FINAL STATE: 131/132 VERIFIED. 0 PARTIALLY_VERIFIED. 1 UNVERIFIABLE (J-Tpeakc). Composite: 99.9.

rules_basis.gap_of_12_note: Estimated total of 144 exceeds tracked count of 132. Gap represents rules in scope not yet enumerated in structured rules file.

D1_rule_verification_depth.label: Rule Verification Depth — Fully Verified / Total Tracked
D1_rule_verification_depth.status: MAXIMUM ACHIEVABLE — 131/132 VERIFIED. 0 PARTIALLY_VERIFIED. 1 permanently unverifiable (J-Tpeakc, CiPA-era).

detail.note: CONSOLIDATED_D1.json is authoritative. All PV items (PV-01 through PV-19) closed across Passes 7b-9. Final pass: pv08-to-pv19-quotes.json closed all remaining items. 1 permanently unverifiable (J-Tpeakc — absent from all finalized ICH sources; CiPA origin).

confirmed_not_in_ich_source.j_tpeakc_biomarker: NOT present in ICH E14/S7B Q&As (Feb 2022, all 46pp). CiPA-era concept. Must not be attributed to ICH guidance.
confirmed_not_in_ich_source.20_bpm_hr_threshold: NOT present in ICH E14/S7B Q&As. No numerical HR threshold in Q&A 6.1. Retracted from rules.
confirmed_not_in_ich_source.out_of_scope_excipients_herbals: NOT named verbatim in S7A §1.3. Inferred from scope definition (NCEs/biotech). Reclassified INFERRED.

D2_gap1_exploratory_trials.label: Gap-1: Exploratory Clinical Trials — Approaches Fully Verified

D3_gap2_modality_considerations.label: Gap-2: Modality Considerations — Topics Fully Covered

detail.gene_therapies: VERIFIED (Pass 3) — FDA CGT guidance Section III.B.5
detail.antibody_drug_conjugates: VERIFIED (FIX-001) — No ADC-specific guidance in finalized ICH E14/S7B Q&As (Q1–Q30). Sources: FDA_E14_S7B_QAs_Guidance.pdf (Aug 2022) + EMA_E14_S7B_QAs_Step5.pdf (Mar 2022). General ICH S7A/S7B principles apply.
detail.oligonucleotides: VERIFIED (FIX-001) — No oligonucleotide-specific guidance in finalized ICH E14/S7B Q&As (Q1–Q30). General ICH S7A/S7B principles apply.
detail.peptides: VERIFIED (FIX-001) — No peptide-specific guidance in finalized ICH E14/S7B Q&As (Q1–Q30). S7A core battery applies without modification.

D3_gap2_modality_considerations.fix_001_key_finding: Q15/6.3 is the only modality-specific Q&A in Q1–Q30 — it covers large targeted proteins and mAbs only. No ADC, oligonucleotide, or peptide content exists in finalized Q&As. Absence confirmed in both FDA (Aug 2022) and EMA (Mar 2022) adopted versions of identical ICH text.

D4_gap3_regional_differences.label: Gap-3: Regional Differences — Topics Fully Covered

detail.safety_pharm_specific_regional: VERIFIED (FIX-002) — FDA_S7A_Safety_Pharmacology_Guidance.pdf (Apr 2001, Jan 2025 Update) is ICH S7A verbatim with no FDA-specific additions. ICH harmonization complete. No regional divergence across US/EU/Japan.

D4_gap3_regional_differences.fix_002_key_finding: FDA S7A guidance document (pages 1–13, read in full) contains the ICH S7A text adopted verbatim. No FDA-specific requirements, footnotes, preamble conditions, or additional endpoints exist beyond the harmonized ICH text. Jan 2025 Update is administrative only.

D5_gap4_proarrhythmia.label: Gap-4: Proarrhythmia Model Qualification — Criteria Covered

dimensions_below_100: D1_rule_verification_depth (99.2) — 1 permanently unverifiable (J-Tpeakc, CiPA-era, not in finalized ICH). This is the maximum achievable score.

what_remains_below_100.d1_gap_description: 1 rule unverifiable: J-Tpeakc biomarker in clinical_implications. Confirmed absent from S7B (2005), E14 (2005), and all 46 pages of E14/S7B Q&As (Feb 2022). CiPA-era concept. 0 partially verified rules remain.
what_remains_below_100.d1_path_to_100: Would require finalized second-round ICH E14/S7B Q&A explicitly endorsing J-Tpeakc (anticipated ~September 2025 per IWG 2024 Concept Paper). No such document exists as of 2026-03-23.

rule_counts_final.unverifiable_detail: J-Tpeakc biomarker — not in any finalized ICH source (S7A, S7B, E14, E14/S7B Q&As). CiPA origin.

all_fixes_summary.FIX_001: RESOLVED — ADC/oligo/peptide modality rules VERIFIED. No modality-specific guidance in finalized ICH E14/S7B Q&As. D3: 50→100.
all_fixes_summary.FIX_002: RESOLVED — Regional differences VERIFIED. FDA S7A is ICH S7A verbatim; no regional divergence. D4: 75→100.
all_fixes_summary.FIX_003: RESOLVED (Pass 4) — 3 timing rules upgraded PARTIALLY_VERIFIED→VERIFIED. D1: 78→80.
all_fixes_summary.QAS_QUOTES: RESOLVED (Pass 6) — combination_drugs (Q&A 6.2), heart_rate_confounding (Q&A 6.1), clinical_implications (Q&A 7.1) upgraded. J-Tpeakc confirmed NOT in ICH Q&As. 20 bpm HR threshold confirmed NOT in ICH Q&As. D1: 80→83.
all_fixes_summary.S7A_PASS: RESOLVED (Pass 7) — well_characterized_pk_pd_exception (S7A 2.9), cns_abuse_liability (S7A 2.8.2.4). HRV and pooling omissions corrected. out_of_scope reclassified INFERRED. D1: 83→84.
all_fixes_summary.D1_CLOSE_PASS7b: RESOLVED — PV-01 through PV-07 closed (GLP/toxicology, pilot studies GLP exemption, non-GLP reporting, hERG vehicle controls, concentration verification, recording quality, S6(R1) incorporation). D1: 84.8→90.2.
all_fixes_summary.PASS9_PV18_PV19: RESOLVED — pv08-to-pv19-quotes.json (2026-03-23). PV-18 (S7B §3.1.3 dose-design) and PV-19 (S7B §3.1.1 positive control) closed. D1: 97.7→99.2. FINAL: 131/132. Composite: 99.9. No partially verified items remain.
